message:
test: add comprehensive interop integrity test suite (issue #54)

12 tests covering every pattern that could trigger stock SQLite
integrity_check failure on FrankenSQLite-authored databases:

- Issue #54 exact reproduction (execute_batch, drop without close)
- DELETE + reinsert (freeblock accounting)
- Delete all + reinsert (freelist page recycling)
- Multiple indexes (B-tree balance across index trees)
- Large blobs (overflow page chains)
- UPDATE with indexed columns (index entry removal + reinsertion)
- 2000 rows (multi-level B-tree splitting)
- Composite primary keys
- UNIQUE constraints with delete + reinsert
- Transaction rollback then commit
- WAL mode checkpoint

All pass on current HEAD. Serves as regression guard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
